text:
Market today: The market's leaning on tech, with some energy whispers. The real driver for your book is still the chip/tech sector's direction.

Your holdings: SMH (-11.02%) and SOXL (-45.06%) are flagged for SELL. QQQ (-1.2%) and QQQI (-2.48%) are TRIM. Remember, margin amplifies these drops, especially on leveraged names like SOXL and SPAL.

Watch: Keep an eye on Micron (headline 2) for sector sentiment.

Bottom line: Focus on managing your underperforming tech and leveraged positions.
plays: Trim QQQI if it breaks below 52.
Consider trimming SMH if it fails to hold 540.
No new buys today - hold and watch
